title: AKNU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: AKNU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Adikavi Nannaya University has officially declared the LLM 1st Semester and B.Tech 8th Semester Results 2026 for the 2025-2026 academic session. Students can check their result status online at the official AKNU exam portal at aknu.edu.in.

content.text: Adikavi Nannaya University (AKNU) has officially released the 1st Semester LLM and 8th Semester B.Tech results for the academic session 2025-2026. The results have been declared for LLM 1st Sem Regular and Backlog Exam February 2026 and B.Tech 8th Sem Exam April 2026 on the official portal. AKNU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - aknu.edu.in.

Students can check and download their results by logging into the results portal using their registration number or hall ticket number along with the captcha code for verification. The university has made the provisional result copies available for download, which students can save for future reference and academic purposes. Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their result including name, registration number, subject-wise marks, and overall status. In case of any discrepancies or errors in the result, students should immediately contact the examination cell of Adikavi Nannaya University for clarification and correction.

Adikavi Nannaya University has published the latest LLM 1st Semester and B.Tech 8th Semester results on its official website for the 2026 academic session, and students can log in to download their provisional results for reference. The results cover regular and backlog examinations conducted in February 2026 for LLM and April 2026 for B.Tech programmes. Students appearing for these examinations can access their subject-wise marks and overall status using their login credentials through the official result portal at aknu.edu.in.

rows: Online result declaration in provisional format
Registration number / Hall ticket number and captcha code

content.text: Adikavi Nannaya University has activated the direct links to check AKNU Result 2026 for LLM 1st Semester and B.Tech 8th Semester examinations on its official result portal. Students appearing for LLM and B.Tech programmes can instantly view or download their semester results through the direct links provided below using their registration or hall ticket number. These direct links help candidates quickly access their marks and result status without navigating multiple pages on the university website.

links.label: AKNU LLM 1st Sem Reg & Backlog Exam RV Dates Feb 26 Results
AKNU LLM 1st Sem Reg & Backlog Exam Feb 26 Results
AKNU B.Tech 8th Sem Exam April 26 Results

content.text: Students can follow these simple steps to check and download their AKNU 1st and 8th Semester Result 2026 from the official website:

items: Visit the official website of Adikavi Nannaya University at aknu.edu.in
Navigate to the 'Results' section or click on the direct result link at aknu.edu.in/results
Select the appropriate result link - LLM 1st Semester or B.Tech 8th Semester as applicable
Enter your registration number or hall ticket number in the required field
Type the captcha code displayed on the screen for verification
Click on the 'Submit' or 'View Result' button to access your result
Your AKNU Result 2026 will appear on the screen showing subject-wise marks and overall status
Check all the details carefully including name, registration number, and marks obtained
Download and save the provisional result copy for future reference
Take a printout of the result for your academic records
